name: @iap/playground
description: IaP public Planning Playground (roadmap-v2 Phase 19, M19.5). A safe, local, plan-only web app that runs a natural-language request through the full plan-preview pipeline (author -> validate -> architecture -> dependencies -> cost -> security -> compliance -> AWS plan preview) and shows the result. No credentials, no deploy, no state written to disk — results are in-memory only. It reuses the existing @iap/* engines server-side; the browser holds no planning logic.
